title: Chi lavora è perduto (In capo al mondo)
writer: Franco Arcalli, Tinto Brass, Gian Carlo Fusco
actors: Sady Rebbot, Pascale Audret, Nando Angelini
plot: Bonifacio is 27 years old and he is roaming about Venice. He is trying to decide whether to accept a job or not. In so doing, he recalls all his past life: his love story with Gabriella, his old friend Claudio, who had always rega...
